F:\cmakkke\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\accuracy_engine_simple.dir/objects.a
C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\accuracy_engine_simple.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\accuracy_engine_simple.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\accuracy_engine_simple.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o accuracy_engine_simple.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libaccuracy_engine_simple.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\accuracy_engine_simple.dir\linkLibs.rsp
